annual_rate.notes: Minnesota preverdict interest under Minn. Stat. §549.09 subd. 1(b) is computed per subd. 1(c): the default rate (currently 4%) applies, but judgments/awards OVER $50,000 (other than certain categories) accrue 10% — the same two-tier split as post-judgment interest. Current value as of 2026-07-09; verify at revisor.mn.gov. Not legal advice.
